creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the update Nikolay

Could you please:

- Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere), as it will be merged to the quarterly branch (bugfixes).
- Set the maintainer-approval flag to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of. You can do this with Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+], or setting the flag during attachment upload.
